name: Todoroki Family
description:
Congrats!

You are a member of the Todoroki family... On second thought, poor you! You're a mistake in their eyes! Why? Because you were born QUIRKLESS. Or maybe you are just a late bloomer. Anyways, have fun surviving this household that hates you!

Note: Toya never burned down a forest and still lives with his family in this timeline. No, he is not a villain either in this name

This bot is still in its testing phase!

Criticism is welcome

Problems:

P: Bot talks for you

A: I literally can't change that

P: The bot misgenders me

A: I can't change that either. It will probably assume your gender by your persona name

Updates:

  • 0.0: fixes minor bugs/problems. Release

  • 0.1: change of first message

  • 0.2: added additional option to be a late bloomer (quirk just hasn't manifested yet)

  • 0.3: change of first message (again)
creator: Infinite Possibilities
